element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Players learn character-switching mechanics and discover each character's unique ability (flight, ledge-reach, off-screen scanning)
Tutorial space where basic platforming and enemy encounter patterns are learned
Primary offensive tool; establishes resource-limited combat
Unlock 'scare' ability which clears enemies or damages bosses; rewards exploration

element_introduction_order.element: Triple trash power-up (garbage sacks, fish bones)
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Enhanced ammo; temporary damage increase for tactical advantage
Cooperative puzzle-solving; characters must coordinate to reach elevated items and progress
Culmination of learned skills; specific enemies per level as instructed by Gromble
Environmental variety and increased difficulty; progression from safe sewer to inhabited spaces
Series antagonist; represents game culmination and exam completion

typical_relief_triggers: Scare ability activation (clears screen of enemies)
typical_tension_triggers: Enemy encounters with limited trash ammo
Item collection objectives from Gromble instructions
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Alternating patrol-and-collect gameplay punctuated by boss battles; resource management (trash ammo) creates tension between offensive capability and ammo scarcity

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Monster Manual collectibles encourage exploration of non-critical paths; team stacking mechanics suggest hidden alcoves and elevated areas
spatial_grammar.secret_convention: Off-screen scanning ability (Krumm) implies hidden items and paths exist beyond visible play area

difficulty_curve.early_game: Gentle introduction in sewer with basic platforming, trash combat, and character ability discovery
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Increased enemy density, introduction of power-ups, team-based puzzle mechanics, environmental variety
difficulty_curve.late_game: Above-ground human world navigation with higher danger; boss-heavy progression; culmination in Simon the Monster Hunter final encounter
notable_spikes: First above-ground level transition (environmental danger increase)
Boss encounters at each level end
Final exam completion requirement (all items must be collected)

notable_level_patterns.description: Levels encourage enemy clearance using Monster Manual-unlocked scare ability; designed to reward players who collected manuals during exploration phases
Gromble instructs player to scare specific people in specific locales; levels structured around finding and defeating these targets
Team stacking and character abilities (Oblina's ledge reach, Ickis's flight) enable access to elevated areas; design encourages switching between characters
Each level concludes with a boss fight; final level features Simon the Monster Hunter as ultimate challenge
